ShortDescription.Value: Adjust school sizes. Increase the number of students, adjust fees

Publish.LongDescription:
### Adjust School Capacity (Redux)
Change how many students your schools can handle without adding more buildings.
- Lower or increase the number of students. - Convenient buttons to **Reset to Vanilla** defaults or **Quick Start** preset values. - Increase or decrease the fees each student enrolled pays. - Household receives a stipend of 20% of the school fees if slider is set to -20%. - This is not free or magic money. Student households receive money; the city treasury loses the same category of income. - Please hit the like button, it helps people can find this mod easier.
### Notes
- Safe to remove or disable any time (set sliders to 100% for vanilla values) - Remove other mods that do school student sizing to avoid conflicts. - Mod is compatible with all my other mods. - Mod does not use Harmony patch and is more resilient to game updates.
### Support and Feedback - Report issues on Github link, Forum link, or Discord.
### 12 Languages Hello, Bonjour, Hallo, Hola, Ciao, こんにちは, 안녕하세요, 你好, 你好, Cześć, Olá, Olá
### Credits
- River-Mochi – mod author - Inspired by Wayz's original School Capacity (retired) - Joksan, Obelix, Necko1996 – code update and testing
tags: city schools, education capacity, automatic increase school size controller
Publish.ChangeLog: * Added a school fees and subsidized stipend system. * Elementary and High School sliders now support up to 1000% (fills request by Nicux) * Settings changes now save immediately. * Updated translations.
